title: Aurora Palm Pals, Ella the Bunny Soft Toy, 61243, 5 inches, Beige , Brown
features: Part of Aurora's Palm Pal collection
Adorable Bunny cuddly toy that is filled with beans
Perfect gift for anyone who loves rabbits
description: From the manufacturer Aurora Palm Pals, Ella the Bunny Soft Toy Palm Pals Ella Bunny Soft Toy fits perfectly in the palm of your hand, she is full of beans which makes her super soft and squishy. Her body is light brown and white all over and she has a plump little belly. This little bunny has the cutest little smile which brings a smile to the face of everyone she meets.
